patch.value: MCP pm_list/pm_search: expose active filter summary in compact output so agents know what was applied

When an agent calls pm_list with options.status='open' and options.type='Feature', the compact output already includes a `filters` section (from runList). But via the narrow pm_list tool, filters are nested inside `options: {}` with no top-level declaration, so the unexpected-key warning system (pm-qxwu) doesn't validate them, and the MCP tool description does not list the available filter keys. This creates a discoverability gap: agents must either call pm_run or read the option description prose. Adding a `query_summary` field in structuredContent.result that echoes back the resolved filters and projection mode would close the feedback loop.

- pm_list/pm_search compact MCP output includes an applied-filters summary
- Agents can see which filters were applied without re-echoing inputs
- Covered by a contract/snapshot test
